scenario.name: KubeVoIP Generic Digest Provider
scenario.send: SIP/2.0 407 Proxy Authentication Required [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=provider-auth [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Proxy-Authenticate: Digest realm="provider.example.net", nonce="abcdef0123456789", algorithm=MD5, qop="auth" Content-Length: 0

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=provider [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:provider@provider-primary:5060> [last_Record-Route:] Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=provider 1 1 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000
